response.global_analysis: The video consists of English dialogue between the VTubers and Smokey. Smokey's voice is muffled but has hardcoded subtitles which were used for transcription. Timestamps are precisely synchronized with the audio peaks. Rule explanations and on-screen text were used to verify content. Since the source audio is in English, both the original language (og) and translation (en) fields contain the same text.
